narrative_beat: Wide composicional de quatro pecas sobre altar: pergaminho Rothschild, microfone Maria Ressa, revista Economist, relogio Doomsday

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: four symbolic objects arranged on a long carved stone altar draped in crimson velvet: a rolled parchment sealed with red wax on the left, a vintage brass microphone second from left, an unmarked leather-bound magazine third, and an antique Doomsday clock on the far right showing 23:58:35
subject.focal_point: the four objects evenly spaced under individual spotlights
subject.secondary: crimson velvet drape with gold fringe, candelabra between objects

environment.location: a stone chapel with gothic arched ceiling
environment.atmosphere: sacred evidence chamber, the four witnesses assembled

composition.foreground: four illuminated objects in rich warm tones on crimson altar
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white gothic arches fading into darkness

lighting.key_light: four individual warm spotlights from above, one per object
lighting.fill_light: candlelight glow from candelabra between objects
lighting.rim_light: gold edge highlights on each object
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadows between the four pools of light

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers rising from candelabra

symbolism.primary: four independent witnesses all pointing to the same conclusion

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus across full depth of field

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
